name: Referral Fee Printer Safe
description: Referral link system where promoters share builder, source, or platform fee revenue without defaulting to follower-loss rake.
degenPitch: Referral links that print from fees, not from users getting nuked.
whatItDoes: Creates referral links for copy agents, rooms, signals, APIs, and profiles.
Rejects default loss-rake mechanics in Public Beta.
cursorPrompt: Build a Referral Fee Printer Safe agent with DNA x402. Create referral links for rooms, signals, copy agents, APIs, and profiles; share builder/source/platform fees; never default to loss rake; and bind fee share to receipts.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Referral Fee Printer Safe agent with DNA x402. Create referral links for rooms, signals, copy agents, APIs, and profiles; share builder/source/platform fees; never default to loss rake; and bind fee share to receipts.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds visible builder/source/platform fee lines.
Referral does not collect from follower losses by default.
